title: _typingTimers as single source of truth for typing state
description: The parallel _typingUsers Set was removed; typingUsers getter now returns Set.unmodifiable(_typingTimers.keys). This eliminates a class of bugs where the Set and Map diverge (e.g. timer fires and removes from Map but Set isn't updated). The refactor is correct. A future contributor might add _typingUsers back for 'performance' (O(1) contains vs. Map.keys iteration), but the set is bounded by connected users which is small, and the Map lookup is already O(1) — the parallel Set provides no real benefit and reintroduces the sync risk.
